Reading: State
Poor
Recovery 46 • Sleep 72 • Strain —

Read
Last night gave you enough sleep, but not much restoration, so the day opens with a thin reserve. For muscle gain while trimming fat, this state favors steady effort and adequate nourishment over heavy strain or a deep deficit.

Quiet momentum.
